title: SHEKINAIH IS OUR MAIN LAST DAYS MOSES

paragraphs.text: SHEKINAIH IS OUR MAIN LAST DAYS MOSES

WHERE WE WROTE THE LAST DAYS DOCTRINES, OUR LAST DAYS COMMANDMENTS, EQUIVALENT TO A FURTHER BREAKDOWN OF OUR TEN COMMANDMENTS OF MOSES IN THE OLD TESTAMENT AND FURTHER EXPOUNDING OF THE GIST OF THE TWO COMMANDMENTS OF JESUS, THROUGH OUR DIVINE TEACHING AND WRITING OF JESUS IN HEAVEN, AS I, THE FATHER SPOKE CONTINUOSLY!
BOTH SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL ARE THE 2 OLIVE TREES THAT POURS ANOINTING OIL TO THE 7 CANDLESTICK OF
OUR LAST DAYS 7 CATEGORIES OF CHURCHES IN THE BOOK OF REVELATION AS REVEALED IN BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1, BEHOLD MY GLORY!

REVELATION 11:1 AND THERE WAS GIVEN ME A REED LIKE UNTO A ROD: AND THE ANGEL STOOD, SAYING, RISE, AND MEASURE THE TEMPLE OF GOD, AND THE ALTAR, AND THEM THAT WORSHIP THEREIN. REVELATION 11:2 BUT THE COURT WHICH IS WITHOUT THE TEMPLE LEAVE OUT, AND MEASURE IT NOT; FOR IT IS GIVEN UNTO THE GENTILES: AND THE HOLY CITY SHALL THEY TREAD UNDER FOOT FORTY AND TWO MONTHS. REVELATION 11:3 AND I WILL GIVE POWER UNTO MY TWO WITNESSES, AND THEY SHALL PROPHESY A THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED AND THREESCORE DAYS, CLOTHED IN SACKCLOTH. REVELATION 11:4 THESE ARE THE TWO OLIVE TREES, AND THE TWO CANDLESTICKS STANDING BEFORE THE GOD OF THE EARTH. REVELATION 11:5 AND IF ANY MAN WILL HURT THEM, FIRE PROCEEDETH OUT OF THEIR MOUTH, AND DEVOURETH THEIR ENEMIES: AND IF ANY MAN WILL HURT THEM, HE MUST IN THIS MANNER BE KILLED. REVELATION 11:6 THESE HAVE POWER TO SHUT HEAVEN, THAT IT RAIN NOT IN THE DAYS OF THEIR PROPHECY: AND HAVE POWER OVER WATERS TO TURN THEM TO BLOOD, AND TO SMITE THE EARTH WITH ALL PLAGUES, AS OFTEN AS THEY WILL.
